figures.caption: Figure 1: Performance comparison of state-of-the-art medical MLLMs and traditional deep learning methods across three medical image classification scenarios. Model categories are distinguished by background color: CNN-based (green), MLP-based (yellow), ViT-based (blue), hybrid-based (red), and MLLM-based (gray).
Figure 4: Marginal gains of medical adaptation over general-domain MLLMs: HuatuoGPT-Vision-7B/Lingshu7B/ShizhenGPT-7B-VL vs. Qwen2.5-VL-7B; MedGemma4B/MedGemma-1.5-4B vs. Gemma-3-4B.
Figure 2: Evaluation framework for dissecting classification degradation in medical MLLMs.
Figure 5: Comprehension and utilization dynamics in LLM reasoning. Layer-wise probing accuracy of Lingshu-7B and Lingshu-32B.
Figure 3: Layer-wise probing accuracy curves for 14 medical MLLMs across three datasets.
